features.name: Supabase company_tasks table migration (id, type, status, priority, payload, result, created_at, completed_at)
Main orchestrator loop: poll → plan → delegate → reflect → enqueue next (60s interval)
Planner agent: Claude produces structured execution plan with agent_type + tool_calls JSON from task text
Task router: dispatch plan to engineering_agent / marketing_agent / ops_agent modules based on agent_type
Result handler: capture agent output, write to Supabase company_tasks, update status to completed/failed
Engineering agent module: accepts coding task → dispatches to ACD task-agent.js via subprocess → returns result
GitHub integration: after successful engineering task, trigger git push + optional Vercel deploy webhook
Marketing agent module: accepts campaign task → calls ACTP Safari automation services (3007/3005/3004)
Twitter/X posting via Safari automation port 3007 with AI-generated content from task payload
Email outreach via SMTP integration with Claude-drafted messages and lead list from CRM
Ops agent module: web research via Market Research API port 3106 given research query
Inbox monitor: summarize new DMs via Safari automation, surface action items as new tasks
Reflector: after each task, Claude evaluates result quality and appends lesson to knowledge base
Task generator: reflector auto-proposes 1-3 follow-up tasks and enqueues them in company_tasks
Prompt evolution: reflector updates relevant agent prompt files in prompts/ dir when high-confidence lessons found
Activity log: append every orchestrator action to logs/orchestrator-activity.jsonl with ts, task, agent, result
Live status endpoint: GET /status returns current task, queue depth, last 20 activity lines as JSON
Metrics tracker: daily summary written to company_metrics table (tasks completed, agents used, success rate)
CLI: python orchestrator.py --run (daemon), --once (single tick), --status, --enqueue 'task text'
.env config + README.md with quickstart: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_KEY, agent enable flags
